problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
mechanism: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry
hypothesis: If Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry is applied to fully, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 18 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
